sglang.title: Fix CI and triton moe Configs
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR copied some old triton moe configs from 3.1 folder to 3.2 folder.
It fixed a regression in our CI caused by #5955
Failed test case: https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/actions/runs/15517438930/job/43686932213#step:6:1921

sglang.title: Fix draft extend ut stability with flush cache
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This test case may fail with small probability. The possible reason is that the cache of the warmup request may affect the test result, so add flush cache before test to make it stable.

vllm.title: [Misc] Change tests/compile to use VLLM_V1 by default
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Previously, the tests were setting USE_VLLM_V1=0. Because torch.compile is turned on by default for V1 (and off by default for V0), and because we are moving to deprecate V0, this PR changes tests/compile to set USE_VLLM_V1=1. Realistically speaking V1 and V0 both use compile in the same wa

vllm.title: [Multi Modal] Add an env var for message queue max chunk bytes
vllm.author: jennyyyyzhen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Context:
One perf bottleneck of multimodal inference is IPC. vLLM uses shared memory to broadcast small data and zmq to broadcast large data. Currently, max chunk bytes are hardcoded to be 10MB, while Llama4 single image embedding size is ~11MB, which means it now uses zmq to broadcast input. An eas

vllm.title: [Bugfix] model_max_length should consider max_model_len in tokenizer_config
vllm.author: noooop
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
model_max_length should consider max_model_len in tokenizer_config
e.g.
BAAI/bge-reranker-base
config.json "max_position_embeddings": 514,
tokenizer_config.json "model_max_length": 512,
when XLMRobertaForSequenceClassification is used as cross-encoding
Because RobertaEmbedding uses padding_idx, the
